response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack and D/Node.js engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role requires 8 years of C++ as a hard minimum, plus 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems and 3 years of software design/architecture aligned to cloud compute platforms. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and no demonstrated cloud compute platform leadership or production C++ distributed systems work. Tech lead/mentoring signals exist (workshops, dojos, founder role), but the core C++ and platform requirements are not met.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background with staff/senior titles and long tenure
Demonstrated mentoring and teaching via workshops, dojos, and courses
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ minimum — only short C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed-systems leadership experience
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at the required scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform leadership
